title: minuartia tenuifolia subvar. viscidula
intro: Minuartia tenuifolia subvar. viscidula, also known as Sticky Dwarf-Willow or Sticky Rock-cress, is a rare and endangered succulent plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Minuartia tenuifolia subvar. viscidula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but due to its rarity and potential toxicity, it should be used under the guidance of a qualified herbalist or medical professional.
